title: 生物制药工艺学（技术与基础）
description: 生物制药产业已成为制药工业中发展最快、活力最强和技术含量最高的领域，是21世纪的“钻石”产业。生物药物创新研究已成为新药开发的重要方向，许多疑难杂症将在此突破，如肿瘤、AIDS等。本课程将介绍生物制药工艺技术基础，为学生日后步入生物制药行业提供坚实理论基础和相应技术手段。Biopharmaceutical industry, known as  "diamond" industry in the 21st century, has become the fastest growing, vigorous and high technology field in the pharmaceutical industry. As an important part of innovative drug research, breakthrough progress was expected in biopharmaceutical to overcame complicate diseases, as cancer, AIDS and so on. This course will introduce basis of biopharmaceutical process, and provide theoretical basis and  technical methods for their future occupation in biopharmaceutical industry of students.

instructors.name: 高向东;孔毅;郑珩;童玥;虞菊萍;劳兴珍;宋潇达;何书英
